response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack engineering experience, deep systems thinking, and notable open-source contributions, including AI-agent infrastructure work — aligning with the role’s AI-native context. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of distributed systems design at scale, Python mastery, or direct experience with AI-driven code generation as a core workflow, and his employment history contains inconsistencies (e.g., Kenya-based roles with German companies) that raise credibility questions.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong systems thinking demonstrated via high-throughput systems and open-source tooling
Proven ownership across full-stack development, DevOps, and operational tooling
concerns: No clear evidence of Python mastery or deep distributed systems design experience
Ambiguous employment geography (Kenya-based roles with EU companies) raises red flags
Lacks explicit mention of on-call ownership, agile scrum champion role, or incident response
